seoTitle: Tawonga vs Tawonga South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tawonga and Tawonga South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tawonga vs Tawonga South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tawonga and Tawonga South.
heading: Tawonga vs Tawonga South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tawonga, Victoria and Tawonga South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tawonga South has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tawonga (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tawonga or Tawonga South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tawonga has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Tawonga South scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tawonga scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Tawonga South scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tawonga or Tawonga South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tawonga South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
